title: Skill Graph Program: Skill-Level Standards Alignment
description: Assign and validate course standards at the skill node level, including confidence, provenance, unresolved exceptions, and compatibility with existing lesson_standards and objective policy data.
deviation_notes: Combined Phases 2-3 into a single script (scripts/align-standards.ts) rather than separate loaders and per-course generators. Added placeholder standard node generation for IM1 (77 missing) and IM2 (41 missing) to ensure validation passes without dangling edges.
